title: lastrea deflexa
intro: Lastrea deflexa, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of fern found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Lastrea deflexa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
